nasb.text: Then Jehoiada the priest gave to the captains of hundreds the spears and the large and small shields which had been King David’s, which were in the house of God.

esv.text: And Jehoiada the priest gave to the captains the spears and the large and small shields that had been King David’s, which were in the house of God.

cnv.text: 於是耶何耶大祭司把　神的殿裡，原本屬於大衛王的矛槍、大盾和小盾，交給了眾百夫長；

ccb.text: 耶何耶大祭司把上帝殿中大卫王的矛枪和大小盾牌交给百夫长。
